privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task expects the agent to create a synthetic user account with username 'maria_santos', password 'TrainerPass2024!', first name 'Maria', last name 'Santos', and email 'maria.santos@fitnessgym.com'. These exact values are explicitly instructed in the task description and hardcoded as assertions in both export_result.sh and verifier.py.
